negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing deterministic parallel-simulation pipeline for scheduled async candidates: no hash-deduped parallel simulation batch, revival-lane filtering before the global cap, max-simulation limiting, or sequential post-simulation async-cache insertion path was found.
related_but_insufficient_code: The port does perform sequential parent-state scheduled obligation filtering and active-job skipping before execution.
No audited payload-building path implements the described bounded parallel scheduled async simulation phase, max-simulation limiting, or post-parallel sequential insertion/cache update phase.

notes: Confirmed gap for the full invariant.
rationale: The current builder path combines scheduled constraint filtering, bounded parallel simulation, deterministic sequential post-simulation filtering, and revival lane selection before the global simulation cap.
statement: At current tip, payload building must run scheduled pool transactions through scheduled block-building constraints before execution; scheduled async candidates may be simulated in parallel only after hash deduplication, revival lane filtering, and max-simulation limiting, while sender deduplication, active-job checks, wallet and TTL validation, async-cache updates, and detected-transaction insertion remain sequential after simulation.
suggested_falsification_tests: Place one scheduled transaction that violates scheduled constraints and one that passes in the pool, build a payload, and assert only the valid transaction reaches scheduled execution.

Provide duplicate scheduled candidates, unselected revival candidates, same-sender candidates, an active-job duplicate, an insufficient-wallet candidate, an over-TTL candidate, and a valid candidate; assert final results match sequential filter semantics and only eligible candidates are returned after parallel simulation.
summary: Scheduled builder filtering is only partially present; the deterministic parallel-simulation policy is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Provide duplicate scheduled candidates, unselected revival candidates, same-sender candidates, and cap overflow; current port has no parallel scheduled async simulation batch to enforce the specified ordering.
title: Scheduled builder filtering remains deterministic around parallel simulation
